name: cdt-ai

metadata.name: cdt.ai
metadata.summary: Cognitive Data Transformer for text, image, audio, and video processing

documentation:
# Cognitive Data Transformer (CDT)

CDT is a versatile library designed to process and analyze multi-modal data (text, images, audio, and documents) and generate actionable insights using advanced AI tools.

## Installation

To install the CDT library, run the following command:

functions.name: cdt.audio_processing.get_mimetype
documentation: Detects the MIME type of a file (e.g., audio file) using python-magic.

functions.name: cdt.audio_processing.transcribe_audio
documentation: Transcribes audio using Whisper.

functions.name: cdt.audio_processing.extract_audio_features
documentation: Extracts audio features (MFCC) using Librosa.

functions.name: cdt.audio_processing.process_audio_file
documentation: Processes the audio file: transcribe and extract features.

modules.name: cdt.data_processing
documentation: cdt/data_processing.py

functions.name: cdt.text_processing.preprocess_text
documentation: Preprocess the text by removing stopwords and punctuation.

functions.name: cdt.text_processing.summarize_text
documentation: Summarize the text using a basic frequency-based approach.

functions.name: cdt.text_processing.analyze_sentiment
documentation: Analyze sentiment using VaderSentiment.

functions.name: cdt.text_processing.vectorize_text
documentation: Convert the text to a vector using CountVectorizer.

functions.name: cdt.text_processing.extract_entities
documentation: Extract named entities from the text using spaCy.

modules.name: cdt
documentation: cdt/__init__.py

modules.name: cdt.cdt
documentation: cdt/main.py

functions.name: cdt.video_processing.get_mimetype
documentation: Detects the MIME type of a file (e.g., video file) using python-magic.

functions.name: cdt.video_processing.extract_frames_from_video
documentation: Extracts frames from a video file and returns them as a list of frames.

functions.name: cdt.video_processing.process_video
documentation: Processes a video by trimming the first 10 seconds and saving it to a new file.

functions.name: cdt.video_processing.process_video_file
documentation: Processes the video file: extract frames, trim, and return processed video.

functions.name: cdt.image_processing.get_mimetype
documentation: Detects the MIME type of an image using python-magic.

functions.name: cdt.image_processing.extract_text_from_image_easyocr
documentation: Extracts text from an image using EasyOCR.

functions.name: cdt.image_processing.process_image_with_pytesseract
documentation: Extracts text from an image using Pytesseract.

functions.name: cdt.image_processing.process_image
documentation: Processes the image and applies both EasyOCR and Pytesseract.

functions.name: cdt.document_processing.get_mimetype
documentation: Detects the MIME type of a file (e.g., document) using python-magic.

functions.name: cdt.document_processing.extract_text_from_pdf
documentation:
Extracts text from a PDF using PyMuPDF.
This method handles text extraction from a wide range of PDFs.

functions.name: cdt.document_processing.extract_tables_from_pdf
documentation:
Extracts tables from a PDF using pdfplumber.
This method extracts tables present in the PDF and returns them as a list of dictionaries.

functions.name: cdt.document_processing.extract_text_from_scanned_pdf
documentation: Extracts text from scanned PDFs (images within PDFs) using OCR with PyTesseract.

functions.name: cdt.document_processing.extract_metadata_from_pdf
documentation: Extracts metadata such as author, title, and creation date from a PDF file.

functions.name: cdt.document_processing.split_pdf
documentation: Splits a PDF into individual pages and saves them as separate PDF files.
